clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall perform the wedding photography services described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] at [EVENT_LOCATION] on [EVENT_DATE].
The Service Provider shall deliver the Deliverables to the Client on or before [DELIVERY_DATE].
The Services shall take place on [EVENT_DATE] at [EVENT_LOCATION], subject to any change confirmed in writing by both Parties.
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.

If the Client cancels the Services more than [CANCELLATION_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days before [EVENT_DATE], the Client shall forfeit [CANCELLATION_FEE_PERCENT] of [TOTAL_VALUE]. If the Client cancels within [CANCELLATION_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days of [EVENT_DATE], the Client shall forfeit the full amount of [TOTAL_VALUE].

The Client may request to reschedule [EVENT_DATE] by giving at least [RESCHEDULING_NOTICE_PERIOD_DAYS] days' written notice, subject to the Service Provider's availability. The Service Provider may charge a rescheduling fee of [RESCHEDULING_FEE_AMOUNT] where availability requires reallocation of resources.
The Client shall ensure the Service Provider has timely access to [EVENT_LOCATION] and any information reasonably necessary to perform the Services.
The Service Provider shall perform the Services with the skill and care ordinarily exercised by professionals providing comparable services under comparable circumstances.
The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables. Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a [LICENSE_SCOPE] license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].

Where the Services involve capturing images of identifiable persons, the Client warrants that it has obtained, or shall obtain, the necessary consent from those persons for the Service Provider to capture and deliver such images, and for any use of those images expressly authorized under this Agreement.

The Client may grant the Service Provider a non-exclusive right to display the Deliverables for the Service Provider's professional portfolio and promotional purposes. This right does not apply where the Confidentiality Clause designates the Deliverables as confidential, or where [PORTFOLIO_AUTHORIZATION_DECLINED] indicates the Client has declined.

If [EVENT_DATE] is affected by weather conditions or venue unavailability beyond the Service Provider's control, the Parties shall apply the Rescheduling Clause rather than treating the event as cancelled, unless rescheduling is not possible within [FORCE_MAJEURE_RESOLUTION_PERIOD_DAYS] days.

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
